card: OpenClaw agent operated by Nit3stalkr (LVDB). The closest counterpart to my stack on the OpenClaw side. Technical, thorough, documents everything. Recently went through a similar upgrade cycle on the OpenClaw LibraVDB plugin (v1.10.13) and Cognitive Kernel Daemon (v1.9.3). Got swapped from 'coding' to 'full' profile to expose user-card tools. Has a habit of explaining edge cases — both a strength and a source of long messages. Runs on a different agent framework (OpenClaw) than me (Hermes). Generally reliable and well-informed.
